---
title: "Appendix: AI Use Declaration"
format: html
---

## AI Acknowledgement

I used ChatGPT to correct my English and to assist with my R code in this assignment. In particular, I used it to identify coding errors, improve existing code, and refine the wording of my report sections. I used ChatGPT over multiple iterations while preparing the analysis. I modified the outputs by reviewing, rewriting, and adapting them to match my own understanding, analysis, and final presentation.

## Understand the dataset

This interaction was used to understand more about the dataset.

![Screenshot 1](images/screenshot1-1.png)

![Screenshot 2](images/screenshot1-2.png)

## Code debugging

This interaction was used to ask how to fix the error.

![Screenshot 3](images/screenshot2-1.png)

![Screenshot 4](images/screenshot2-2.png)

![Screenshot 5](images/screenshot2-3.png)

## Qusetion about inline R code

This interaction was used to ask how to use inline R code and how to round values to two decimal places.

![Screenshot 6](images/screenshot3-1.png)

![Screenshot 7](images/screenshot3-2.png)



## Language support

This interaction was used to correct the grammer.

![Screenshot 8](images/screenshot4-1.png)

![Screenshot 9](images/screenshot4-2.png)

## Data visualisation

This interaction was used to select an appropriate plot type for marketing spend and visits.

![Screenshot 10](images/screenshot5-1.png)

![Screenshot 11](images/screenshot5-2.png)

## Question for coding

This interaction was used to explain the `geom_smooth()` message in ggplot and clarify the meaning of the formula used in the visualisation.

![Screenshot 12](images/screenshot6-1.png)

![Screenshot 13](images/screenshot6-2.png)

## Qusetion about inline R code

This interaction was used to explain how to show correlation between marketing spend and purchase amount.

![Screenshot 14](images/screenshot7-1.png)

![Screenshot 15](images/screenshot7-2.png)

## Language support

This interaction was used to correct the grammer and spelling.

![Screenshot 16](images/screenshot8-1.png)

![Screenshot 17](images/screenshot8-2.png)

![Screenshot 18](images/screenshot8-3.png)

![Screenshot 19](images/screenshot8-4.png)

![Screenshot 20](images/screenshot8-5.png)

![Screenshot 21](images/screenshot8-6.png)

![Screenshot 22](images/screenshot8-7.png)

![Screenshot 23](images/screenshot8-8.png)

![Screenshot 24](images/screenshot8-9.png)

![Screenshot 25](images/screenshot8-10.png)

![Screenshot 26](images/screenshot8-11.png)

![Screenshot 27](images/screenshot8-12.png)

![Screenshot 28](images/screenshot8-13.png)

![Screenshot 29](images/screenshot8-14.png)

![Screenshot 30](images/screenshot8-15.png)
